name: Backtests And Reports
status: current local / current historical production-safe fixture proof

results.name: Focused Web backtests/reports pack

results.name: Focused API backtests/reports pack

findings.summary: Fresh production-safe disposable backtest/report fixture proof was not rerun.
Non-Binance historical order-book parity remains outside current V1 support.
Richer report filters, snapshot persistence, and report i18n hardening remain future reporting scope.
